changelog: `standalone-scripts/macro-controller/src/ui/next-inline-ui.ts`: `findNextVariant` now runs `substituteNextValue` on the matched `next-N-steps` body so `{{n}}` (and legacy `${N}`) tokens are rendered before the text reaches the editor, closing the last raw-token paste path.

`standalone-scripts/macro-controller/src/__tests__/inline-strip-decoupled.test.ts`: regression coverage asserting variant bodies with `{{n}}` render as concrete numbers via the Next chip fallback path.
